info.title: ATLAS — Market Intelligence Engine
info.description: Jhaveri Intelligence Platform — Market → Sector → Stock → Decision

get.description: Get all stocks grouped by sector with technicals and RS.
Get 31 sectors with 22 metrics each.
Get market breadth and regime data.
Get top RS momentum gainers and losers.
Get complete deep-dive for a stock with conviction pillars.

parameters.name: include

schema.description: Comma-separated UQL include modules (spec §18.1) — e.g. rs,conviction
schema.title: Include

parameters.description: Comma-separated UQL include modules (spec §18.1) — e.g. rs,conviction

get.description: Get RS score history for a stock.

post.description: Spec §17.5–17.7. Accepts a full UQL envelope — snapshot, aggregation (`group_by` + `aggregations`), or `mode='timeseries'` with `time_range`/`granularity`. Every fixed endpoint under `/stocks` and `/mf` is a thin wrapper over this route, so any payload the engine accepts here is safe to ship.
Spec §17.7. Dispatches a registered template (`backend/services/uql/templates.py::REGISTRY`) with optional params. Adding a template requires no route code.

get.description: List decisions, optionally filtered by entity, user_action, or status.

put.description: Accept, ignore, or override a decision.

schema.title: Response Update Decision Action Api V1 Decisions  Decision Id  Action Put

post.description: Store a new intelligence finding. Idempotent — same natural key upserts.

get.description: List intelligence findings with optional filters.
Vector similarity search over intelligence findings.

Get a single intelligence finding by ID.

Returns §20.4 standard envelope: ``{data: {...}, _meta: {...}}``.
404 if the finding does not exist or is soft-deleted.

Get MF universe grouped by broad_category → category → funds.

Wires real JIP data. ETFs are always excluded (enforced by JIP service).

Get category-level rollup: fund counts, RS composite, flows, quadrant distribution.

p50/p90 manager_alpha computed in SQL via PERCENTILE_CONT.
Quadrant distribution computed from enriched universe rows.
Get category-level flows for the last N months (default 12).

Compute portfolio overlap between exactly two funds.

Returns overlap_pct (Jaccard-style weight overlap) and common_holdings list.
Exactly 2 mstar_ids must be supplied; 400 otherwise.

Get all mutual funds that hold a specific stock symbol.

Returns funds sorted by weight_pct descending.
Get latest holdings for a fund with stock RS and technicals.
Get sector exposure for a fund at latest as_of_date.

Get NAV history for a fund with optional date range.

coverage_gap_days = total calendar days between first and last point minus
actual data point count. Surfaces missing days (including weekends/holidays).
Zero when < 2 data points or no gaps.

Full deep-dive for one MF.

Runs the four independent queries in parallel on separate sessions —
asyncpg can't multiplex one connection, so sequential awaits on a
shared session produced ~5s cold; parallel cuts it to max(slowest).
v2-09 budget: 500ms.

post.description:
Execute a backtest simulation.

Accepts a SimulationConfig and returns the full simulation result including
daily portfolio values, transactions, analytics summary, and tax breakdown.

Save a simulation configuration without running the backtest.

Used for setting up auto-loop configurations that will be re-run on a schedule.

Trigger auto-loop re-run for all saved simulations with is_auto_loop=True.

Runs each simulation independently — one failure does not abort others.
Returns per-simulation status and KPI deltas vs previous run.

Run Optuna TPE parameter optimization for a simulation config.

Searches the parameter space defined in param_ranges to find the
combination that maximizes the chosen objective metric (xirr, sharpe,
cagr, or sortino).

The optimizer fetches price and signal data once, then runs n_trials
backtests with different sampled parameter combinations. Returns the
best parameter set found and the full trial history.

get.description:
Return current status of the in-process auto-loop scheduler.

Reports whether the scheduler is running, how many simulations are active,
and when the last/next scheduled run will occur.

Return drift alert history for a simulation.

Drift events are stored as JSONB on the simulation record and updated
each time the auto-loop detects KPI deviation above threshold.

post.description:
Dispatch re-optimization for a simulation that has detected drift.

Reads the simulation's config and runs Optuna TPE optimization with
the given n_trials and objective. param_ranges defaults to sensible
ranges around the current config's parameters if not provided.

get.description: List saved simulations, newest first, excluding soft-deleted.
Fetch full detail for a single simulation by ID.

delete.description: Soft-delete a simulation by ID. Returns 404 if not found.

post.description:
Import portfolio holdings from a CAMS/KFintech CAS PDF statement.

Parses scheme names, folio numbers, and unit counts via casparser.
Applies fuzzy matching to map schemes to mstar_id via the JIP MF master table.
Manual overrides in atlas_scheme_mapping_overrides short-circuit fuzzy match.

Raw PDF bytes are processed in-memory and never stored permanently.

Create a new portfolio with optional initial holdings.

Accepts a list of holdings; scheme-to-mstar_id mapping is performed
asynchronously in V4-2. For now, holdings are stored with mapping_status='pending'.

get.description: List all portfolios, newest first, excluding soft-deleted.
Fetch full detail for a single portfolio by ID.

put.description:
Update portfolio metadata.

V4-2 implementation pending.

schema.title: Response Update Portfolio Api V1 Portfolio  Portfolio Id  Put

get.description:
Return full portfolio analysis: per-holding JIP enrichment + portfolio-level aggregates.

Per-holding metrics (from JIP): NAV + returns, RS composite + momentum + quadrant,
derived metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, Alpha, Beta), weighted technicals (RSI, breadth, MACD),
sector exposure.

Portfolio-level aggregates: weighted RS (value-weighted), sector concentration,
quadrant distribution, weighted average Sharpe/Sortino/Beta, pairwise fund overlap.

Graceful degradation: if JIP data is unavailable for a holding, it appears
in the `unavailable` list and the analysis continues with remaining holdings.

parameters.name: data_as_of

schema.description: Date for analysis (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.
schema.title: Data As Of

parameters.description: Date for analysis (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.

get.description:
Return Brinson-Fachler attribution analysis for a portfolio.

Computes allocation, selection, and interaction effects per MF category.

Brinson-Fachler model:
  allocation_effect   = (w_p - w_b) * (R_b_sector - R_b_total)
  selection_effect    = w_b * (R_p_sector - R_b_sector)
  interaction_effect  = (w_p - w_b) * (R_p_sector - R_b_sector)

Where:
  w_p = portfolio weight in category (value / total_value)
  w_b = benchmark weight (active_fund_count / total_active_funds, equal-weight)
  R_b_sector = category avg 1Y return from NAV history (via JIP MF service)
  R_p_sector = value-weighted avg manager_alpha for portfolio holdings in category

Returns returns_available=False when NAV history is insufficient for benchmark
returns. Category weights are always computed.

Response includes formula, tolerance, and data_as_of for full traceability.

parameters.name: data_as_of

schema.description: Date for attribution (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.
schema.title: Data As Of

parameters.description: Date for attribution (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.

get.description:
Return portfolio optimization using Riskfolio-Lib (mean-variance + HRP).

Fetches NAV history for each mapped holding (1Y lookback), builds a daily
returns matrix, and runs the requested optimization models under SEBI constraints.

Mean-variance (Classic/MV/Sharpe): maximizes Sharpe ratio subject to per-fund
weight cap (SEBI PMS: 10%) and optional cardinality constraint.

HRP (Hierarchical Risk Parity): hierarchical clustering-based allocation,
no constraint on max weight — naturally diversifies.

Funds with fewer than 20 NAV data points in the lookback window are excluded
and listed in excluded_funds. If no candidates remain, returns 422.

Determinism: same data_as_of + same holdings + same JIP NAV data → identical weights.

parameters.name: data_as_of

schema.description: Date for analysis (ISO 8601). Defaults to today.

get.description: Get system status with data freshness info.
Heartbeat — 12-field status strip. 10s cached.
Quality — returns .quality/report.json verbatim + as_of. 10s cached.
Log tail — last N lines from most recent orchestrator log. 10s cached.
Roadmap — parsed roadmap.yaml joined with state.db. 10s cached.
Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get

get.description:
Readiness probe — DB reachable AND cache prewarm complete.

Returns 503 until `_prewarm_caches()` has populated the equity/MF
aggregate caches. Callers (quality gate, systemd, k8s) should block
on this endpoint so the first live-API probe doesn't race a cold JIP
query that would blow past its latency budget.

schema.title: Response Ready Api V1 Ready Get

get.description: Liveness probe — process is up and serving requests.

Readiness probe — DB reachable AND cache prewarm complete.

Returns 503 until `_prewarm_caches()` has populated the equity/MF
aggregate caches. Callers (quality gate, systemd, k8s) should block
on this endpoint so the first live-API probe doesn't race a cold JIP
query that would blow past its latency budget.

total_active_return.description: Total active return = sum of all effects (allocation + selection + interaction)

tolerance.title: Tolerance
tolerance.description: Precision and rounding used in calculations
tolerance.default: Decimal arithmetic with 6dp intermediate, rounded to 4dp for display

selection_effect.description: w_b * (R_p_sector - R_b_sector) — uses manager_alpha as proxy

total_effect.title: Total Effect
total_effect.description: allocation + selection + interaction for this category

holding_count.title: Holding Count
holding_count.description: Number of portfolio holdings in category

provenance.description: Source tables and formulas for this category's effects

IntelligenceListResponse.title: IntelligenceListResponse
IntelligenceListResponse.description:
List response for findings.

Serializes both ``data`` (§20.4 standard envelope key) and
``findings`` (V1 compat key).  ``_meta`` mirrors ``meta``.

IntelligenceSearchResponse.title: IntelligenceSearchResponse
IntelligenceSearchResponse.description:
Response for vector similarity search.

Serializes both ``data`` (§20.4 standard envelope key — what
``check-api-standard.py`` probes) and ``findings`` (V1 compat key)
pointing at the same list.  ``_meta`` mirrors ``meta`` so
``expect_json_path: '_meta'`` passes the standard gate.

MilestoneResponse.title: MilestoneResponse
MilestoneResponse.description:
One R/A/G dot in the per-chunk process strip. `status` is one of
green | amber | red | pending; `detail` is a short hover-tooltip
explaining where the value came from.

ParamRange.title: ParamRange
ParamRange.description: Range definition for a single optimizable parameter.

ResponseMeta.title: ResponseMeta
ResponseMeta.description:
Response provenance + pagination meta.

V1 fields (data_as_of/record_count/query_ms/stale) remain present and
typed identically for backward compatibility (spec §SC-003). The
additional fields below are populated by `services.uql.meta.build_meta`
for V2 UQL responses; V1 fixed-endpoint callers leave them as defaults.

instrument.title: Instrument
instrument.description: Stock symbol, MF mstar_id, or basket name

instrument.title: Instrument
instrument.description: Stock symbol, MF mstar_id, or basket name

SimulationSaveRequest.title: SimulationSaveRequest
SimulationSaveRequest.description: POST /api/v1/simulate/save request — save config without running.

StockDeepDiveResponse.title: StockDeepDiveResponse
StockDeepDiveResponse.description:
Single-equity deep-dive response (spec §17.10 + §18.2).

Serializes both ``meta`` (V1 contract — frontend reads) and ``_meta``
(the §18 standard path that ``check-api-standard.py`` asserts via
``uql-04-include-system``). Both keys point at the same payload so a
response is loud about which fields are include-attached without
breaking V1 consumers.

TaxSummary.title: TaxSummary
TaxSummary.description: Aggregate tax across the simulation (spec §8 OUTPUT.tax_summary).

TemplateRequest.title: TemplateRequest
TemplateRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/v1/query/template``.

``template`` is the registry key (see
``backend/services/uql/templates.py::REGISTRY``); ``params`` is the
builder-specific param dict (may be omitted for parameterless
templates).

TransactionRecord.title: TransactionRecord
TransactionRecord.description: Single transaction in the simulation log (spec §8 OUTPUT.transactions).

UQLAggregation.title: UQLAggregation
UQLAggregation.description: One aggregation spec inside a UQL request (data-model §1).

UQLRequest.title: UQLRequest
UQLRequest.description: UQL v2 request envelope. Mirrors specs/004-uql-aggregations contract.

UQLResponse.title: UQLResponse
UQLResponse.description: Fully-shaped UQL response — records + total + provenance meta.
